title: CreateIVE
description: Create Modpack for Creative Mode... Build all the factories you want!
body:
# Welcome to

![CreateIVE built in the Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ba0eb35303535a0702c8d2da95d58290fd3a3c2.jpeg)

This is a little 1.21.1 Modpack for playing Create in Creative Mode...
It contains Create, a few Create Addons, some Mods for easier Factory Building like Chunk Loaders or Entangled and also many Optimization Mods, but not the Survival Mods like AppleSkin or somthing like that.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### ⚠️ Make sure to use the Serverpack on servers ⚠️  

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
<details>
<summary>Create Mods</summary>
  
- [Create: Liquid Fuel](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-liquid-fuel)
- [Create: Central Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-central-kitchen)
- [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
- [CreateBetterFps](https://modrinth.com/mod/createbetterfps)
- [Create: Dragons Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dragons-plus)
- [Create: New Age](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Other additional Mods</summary>

- [Security Craft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft)
- [Pretty Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/pretty-pipes)
- [Chunk Loaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-loaders)
- [Item Collectors](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-collectors)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Entangled](https://modrinth.com/mod/entangled)

</details>


Report Issues on my **[Discord](https://discord.gg/mZD8FnCJNc)**!
